mapper.select: select id, user_id as userId, consignee, phone, label, detail, is_default as isDefault from pickup_contact where user_id = #{userId} order by is_default desc, id desc
select id, user_id as userId, consignee, phone, label, detail, is_default as isDefault from pickup_contact where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into pickup_contact( user_id, consignee, phone, label, detail, is_default ) values ( #{userId}, #{consignee}, #{phone}, #{label}, #{detail}, #{isDefault} )
